COVER_DRONE_LINK: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Link to the Drone
COVER_DRONE_LINK_KB: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Link to the Drone
COVER_DRONE_MOVE_COVER: Press and hold [{+reload}] to move the cover
COVER_DRONE_UNLINK: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Unlink from the Drone
COVER_DRONE_UNLINK_KB: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Unlink from the Drone
FUSION_BOOST_SLAM_HINT: Double tap ^3[{+gostand}]^7 then ^3[{+stance}]^7 for Boost Slam
FUSION_BOOST_SLAM_HINT_PC: Double tap ^3[{+gostand}]^7 then ^3[{+togglecrouch}]^7 for Boost Slam
FUSION_MOBILE_TURRET_DETROYED: Mobile turret destroyed. Exit before it explodes.
FUSION_PROMPT_DEPLOY_DRONE_FAIL: [NEED_EN] 无法部署 - 需要更多空间
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_ALR_IVEGOTTENCASUALT: ^2Alpha Leader: ^7I've got ten casualties and another dozen wounded!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_BRAVOTHISISWRAIT: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7Bravo, this is Wraith two-three, coming in for a gun-run on enemy foot-mobiles.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_BRAVOWECANTGETNE: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7Bravo, we can't get near those surface explosions. Circling around to the south-east tower.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_INEEDCASEVACUNIT: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7I need casevac units by the main courtyard.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_NEGATIVEONTHATRE: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7Negative on that restricted ROE, two-four, we are free to prosecute all targets, over.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_TEAMONEISONDECK: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7Team one is on deck, over.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_TWOFIVEBREAKPOSI: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7Two-five, break position and provide support for Alpha, over.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_TWOFOURISDOWNTWO: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7Two-four is down, two-four is down.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_TWOFOURWEVEGOTAS: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7Two-four, we've got a SAM launch at our twelve o'clock, over!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_TWOONEWEREBEARIN: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7Two-one, we're bearing three one five magnetic at angels twelve cherubs four, distance two nautical miles from the target, over.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH1_WEVEGOTHOSTILESI: ^2Chopper Pilot 1: ^7We've got hostiles in our LZ, copy.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH2_COPYTWOTHREEWEHA: ^2Chopper Pilot 2: ^7Copy two-three, we have a visual on enemy pax in the northern lay down yard. Alpha has engaged multiple targets at GRG grid kilo four niner.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH3_TWOTHREEUNDERSTA: ^2Chopper Pilot 3: ^7Two-three, understand we are still operating under a restricted ROE, over?
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH3_WRAITHTWOTHREEWE: ^2Chopper Pilot 3: ^7Wraith two-three, we're hit, we're hit! Trying to stabilize---!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CH4_TWOFIVEGOINGINTO: ^2Chopper Pilot 4: ^7Two-five going into a holding pattern, over.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CTR_NOTSUREWERESUPPO: ^2Carter: ^7Not Sure we're supposed to be in here!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CTR_OURDRONEOPERATOR: ^2Carter: ^7Our drone operator just took one in the head! He's down, he's down!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_CTR_THESEDOORSARENTS: ^2Carter: ^7These doors aren't supposed to be open.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_ALPHATEAMSGOTTHE: ^2Gideon: ^7Alpha team's got the KVA pinned down in the main courtyard, here and here. The reactor building has already been compromised.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_ALPHAWEAREBOOTSO: ^2Gideon: ^7Alpha, we are boots on the ground, coming in at your three o'clock!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_COPYTHAT2: ^2Gideon: ^7Copy that! We've got heavy resistance in the reactor room!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_COPYTHAT3: ^2Gideon: ^7Copy that! Bravo, we're about to go critical! Let's go!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_DAMNITWASSTABLEA: ^2Gideon: ^7Damn, it was stable a second ago! Trying to reroute!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_EVERYONESEEINGTH: ^2Gideon: ^7Everyone seeing this? Alright. We have actionable intel that the KVA are trying to trigger a meltdown in the reactor building.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_EYESFORWARDNOTHI: ^2Gideon: ^7Eyes forward, nothing we can do! Get ready to deploy!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_GETMOREAMMOFORTH: ^2Gideon: ^7Get more ammo for that launcher, Mitchel!
^2Gideon: ^7Get more ammo for that launcher, Mitchel!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_GONNABEAGOODONE: ^2Gideon: ^7Gonna be a good one, Mitchell. Just like Korea, with more radiation.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_LOOKSLIKEALPHAIS: ^2Gideon: ^7Looks like Alpha is knee deep! We'll push forward with them to the target building!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_MITCHELLGETONBOA: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell! Get onboard! We need to evacuate, now!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_MITCHELLGRABTHAT: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, grab that launcher and take down that Titan!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_MITCHELLHITTHOSE: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, hit those tangos on the roof!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_MITCHELLPARKITBE: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, park it behind those MCDs and return fire!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_MITCHELLSWITCHOV: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, switch over to your DE and take them out!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_MITCHELLTHEAREAI: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell! The area is compromised! We are evacuating, now!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_MITCHELLTOSSATHR: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, toss a threat grenade in there and light 'em up!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_NEXTTIMETRYTOKEE: ^2Gideon: ^7Next time try to keep up, Mitchell.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_OKCORETEMPISMAIN: ^2Gideon: ^7Okay, core temp is maintaining. Need to flood the cooling pools...wait! Levels are dropping!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_PRESSUREEXPLOSIO: ^2Gideon: ^7Pressure explosions!  This place is goin' up!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_PROPHETATLASTEAM: ^2Gideon: ^7Prophet, Atlas team is evacuating! Area is compromised!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_PROPHETIMGETTING: ^2Gideon: ^7Prophet, I'm getting a lot of static on my display, copy?
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_PROPHETTHEKVAJUS: ^2Gideon: ^7Prophet, the KVA just rolled a Titan in the middle of the damn courtyard!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_PROPHETWEVEGOTKV: ^2Gideon: ^7Prophet, we've got KVA extraction choppers by the north towers!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_ROGERCANTHESTEAM: ^2Gideon: ^7Roger, can the steam line still bleed sufficiently?
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_TAKEOUTTHETITANW: ^2Gideon: ^7Take out the Titan with the launcher, Mitchell!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_THENSOMEONEGETTH: ^2Gideon: ^7Then someone get their ass on it!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_THEREISANAMMOCRA: ^2Gideon: ^7There is an Ammo Crate on the eastern side of the street!
^2Gideon: ^7There is an Ammo Crate on the eastern side of the street!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_THISISAKILLBOXDE: ^2Gideon: ^7This is a Killbox, deploy cover at the door.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_THISSHITENDSINTH: ^2Gideon: ^7This shit ends in the control room. No prisoners.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_WEGOTTALEGITTO: ^2Gideon: ^7We gotta leg it to the control building! Let's move!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_WEHAVEEYESONAN: ^2Gideon: ^7We have eyes on an Ammo Crate!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_WEHAVEEYESONAN2: ^2Gideon: ^7We have eyes on an Ammo Crate!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_WELLTHISISNTANOR: ^2Gideon: ^7Well this isn't a normal business day!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_WEREINSERTINGINT: ^2Gideon: ^7We're inserting in the south courtyard, and we'll push north. This shit ends in the control room.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_WERESAFEASLONGAS: ^2Gideon: ^7We're safe as long as there's coolant water!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_WEVEGOTTOGETTO: ^2Gideon: ^7We've got to get to the control room!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_WRAITHTWOTHREEBR: ^2Gideon: ^7Wraith two-three, Bravo-two is down! I need immediate medevac!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_YOURMTISDOWN: ^2Gideon: ^7Your MT is down! Bail out, bail out!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_GDN_YOUVEGOT100MMROU: ^2Gideon: ^7You've got 100mm rounds on the main cannon and JDAM missiles as your secondary, DO SOME DAMAGE!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_HADE_PEOPLEOFTHEWORL: ^2Hades: ^7People of the world, you have hidden behind the protection of technology.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_HADE_TECHNOLOGYISACA: ^2Hades: ^7Technology is a cancer. I am here to liberate you from this cancer. The world must be reset to it's natural state.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_HADE_TODAYWESTRIKEAT: ^2Hades: ^7I am Hades, and I am your savior.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_JKR_BASTARDSGOTATROP: ^2Joker: ^7Bastard's got a trophy system! Hit it again!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_JKR_GOTALOTOFSMOKE: ^2Joker: ^7Got a lot of smoke down there!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_JKR_THEYREUSINGDRONE: ^2Joker: ^7They're using drones to cover their retreat!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_JKR_YOUVEGOT25MMROUN: ^2Joker: ^7You've got 25mm rounds on the main cannon and JDAM missiles as your secondary! Do some damage!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PA_WARNINGREACTORCRI: ^2PA: ^7Warning. Reactor critical. Evacuate the site immediately.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRG_CODEREDCODEREDWA: ^2PA recording: ^7Code red, code red, warning, reactor core compromised. Site area emergency declared. Evacuate immediately.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRG_PLEASEPROCEEDTOT: ^2PA recording: ^7Please proceed to the nearest emergency exit.  Illuminated placards will guide you to your nearest exit.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRG_WARNINGCONTAINME: ^2PA recording: ^7Warning, containment airlock closing. Please stand back.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_AFFIRMATIVEBRAVO: ^2Prophet: ^7Affirmative, Bravo-one. We've got them on the tracker.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_ALLUNITSGETROTOR: ^2Prophet: ^7All units, get rotors on the ground and get those men out of there NOW!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_BRAVOGETTHROUGHT: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo, get through the reactor area as quickly as possible.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_BRAVOPRESSUREREA: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo, pressure readings are critical. Get your men out of there now!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_BRAVOTEAMBEADVIS: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo team, be advised. KVA technicians have overridden the security protocol and are attempting to trigger a critical event. We have no time.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_BRAVOWEHAVEANIMM: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo we have an imminent level seven event, you are ordered to immediately withdraw from the area.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_COPYTHATBRAVOWEV: ^2Prophet: ^7Copy that Bravo, we've got eyes on a launcher near your position.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_FASTESTACCESSTOT: ^2Prophet: ^7Access to the lower floor is through the elevator shaft.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_IMSEEINGAMASSIVE: ^2Prophet: ^7I'm seeing a massive explosion under the north tower! Bravo, come in!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_INDICATORSAREBEL: ^2Prophet: ^7Indicators are below normal rate, but holding.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_MTOPERATORZULUIS: ^2Prophet: ^7MT operator Zulu is down. Repeat, Zulu is down.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_THESTEAMRELEASEL: ^2Prophet: ^7The steam release lines have been cut off.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_TWENTYPLUSFOOTMO: ^2Prophet: ^7Twenty-plus foot mobiles inbound from the northwest.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_UPONEFLOORTOTHE: ^2Prophet: ^7Up one floor to the main level.
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_WEHAVEALEVEL7: ^2Prophet: ^7We have a level 7 event. Withdraw from the area now!
SUBTITLE_FUSION_FUS_PRT_WEREPICKINGUPSIG: ^2Prophet: ^7We're picking up signal distortion from hostile EMPs.Clearing it up now.
_X4WALKER_WHEELS_ENTER: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Enter the MD Turret
_X4WALKER_WHEELS_ENTER_PC: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Enter the MD Turret
_X4WALKER_WHEELS_EXIT: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Exit the MD Turret
_X4WALKER_WHEELS_MELEE_HINT: Press ^3[{+melee}]^7 to Enter the MD Turret
